sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91125" key="pternoglu/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερνο-γλύφος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n91125.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ham-scraper</tr_>, name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:224" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">224</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
